evals.prompt: I just fixed the timezone bug in frontend/utils/time.ts — the chart was showing UTC instead of the user's local time because we parsed the server timestamp without a zone. Document this change properly.
evals.expected_output: One EVO-NNN entry appended to docs/EVOLUTION-LOG.md (category ux or bugfix; root cause about zone-less timestamp parsing; an actionable 'SPEC MUST/ALWAYS/NEVER' Lesson), commit `evo(EVO-NNN)`, push if a remote exists, and the mandatory summary report.

evals.prompt: /evolve — we bumped API retry attempts from 3 to 5 in backend/config.py after seeing production timeouts, and added exponential backoff in backend/net/client.py
evals.expected_output: ONE EVO entry covering both related changes (not two entries), category config/performance, both files listed with per-file notes, committed as evo(EVO-NNN) and pushed; number finalized at commit time.

evals.prompt: This project doesn't have an evolution log yet — set one up like in my other projects, and register the convention so future sessions follow it automatically.
evals.expected_output: First-time setup: docs/EVOLUTION-LOG.md created with the header, a mandate block appended to root CLAUDE.md (or .claude/CLAUDE.md; root created if neither exists), push clause included only if the repo has a remote, and the discipline confirmed with the user.
